items.summary: status=partial | project=dinobrain | Implemented and verified safe reinstall documentation plus a full purge uninstaller for DinoBrain. Added installer-created purge launchers, uninstall verification, ZIP-first release packaging with SHA256 generation, version bump to 0.1.3, and pushed main plus tag v0.1.3. Task: DinoBrain live Codex hook diagnostic probe.
Task: DinoBrain live Codex hook diagnostic probe.
Task: Explain whether Codex hook trust approval can be automated for DinoBrain installation, and ident
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Explained that Codex hook trust approval should not be automated because it is the security boundary for command-running hooks. Verified local DinoBrain docs/code state: installer can register user-level hooks, enable hook runtime, run an installed-hook handshake, and provide diagnostics, but cannot bypass Codex's hook trust prompt.

items.title: Task: task-20260703-041404-Re-check-why-GitHub-Release-
items.summary: status=completed | Rechecked GitHub release upload after the user noted GitHub updates had worked previously. Found the earlier miss: git credential fill did not expose credentials, but git credential-manager get did return the GitHub token for the logged-in clockmansy account. Used that token only in-process to run npm run release:win -- -Tag v0.1.3 -ReplaceAsset. Created the GitHub release, uploaded DinoBrainSetup.

items.title: Task: Add installer flow that detects running Codex, restarts or guides reload, and opens/launches a h
items.summary: status=completed | project=dinobrain | Implemented a post-install Codex hook approval flow. The installer now creates DinoBrain Codex Hook Approval.cmd and launches it after hook registration unless skipped. The helper detects stale Codex desktop processes, restarts/reopens Codex, copies /hooks to the clipboard, and shows instructions while preserving the requirement that the user manually trusts the hook.
